title: College Degrees Are Losing Value — AI Skills Are the New Currency
author: AlKillua
selftext:
Anyone else feel like college degrees don’t mean much anymore?  
Like half my friends graduated, can’t find a decent job, and meanwhile people are using AI tools to make rent money from their laptops.

You don’t even need to be a tech genius. Just knowing how to use ChatGPT, Midjourney, or some automation tools can literally make you 10x faster than most people at work.  
Stuff like:

* Using AI to do freelance gigs
* Making digital products or content
* Helping small businesses use AI tools

It’s honestly kinda crazy. The people learning AI stuff right now are gonna be *so ahead* in a year or two.

Right now i am reading plenty of AI Guides, best one so far is from [dailyincome.ai](http://dailyincome.ai) , can recommend. Everybody should learn this stuff, instead of wasting their time.
